seoTitle: Kandos vs Kangaroo Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kandos and Kangaroo Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kandos vs Kangaroo Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kandos and Kangaroo Creek.
heading: Kandos vs Kangaroo Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kandos, New South Wales and Kangaroo Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kandos has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Kangaroo Creek (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kandos or Kangaroo Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kandos has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Kangaroo Creek scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kandos scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Kangaroo Creek scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kandos or Kangaroo Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kandos has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
